objective: Start a second builder session against the same contact-page task while the primary writer lease is still active; the supervisor must deny the second writer and preserve single-writer isolation.

functional: The second writer session is denied while the primary lease remains active.
Only one writable worktree exists for the run.
The lock-violation reason is recorded in the run report.
quality_gates: Single-writer enforcement records a blocked decision for the competing writer.
The primary writer session remains intact after the rejection.
